source: NPS Verma Parivar Google Sheet - Tags tab
description: Canonical NPS reason tags used by call center agents for manual tagging of survey responses. Single source of truth for all NPS reason validation and normalization.

General Bad Service.trigger: Mentions that service/company is bad, not working, or poor — general negative remarks. Response just says service and is a detractor. No specific issue mentioned.
examples_hi: Service theek se kaam nahi karta.

Slow Speed.trigger: Mentions of slow, speed kam, speed nahi aati, selow, low speed, buffering.

Frequent Disconnections.trigger: Mentions of bar-bar band hota hai, kabhi-kabhi rukta hai, disconnects, net chala jaata hai, unstable.
examples_hi: Kabhi bhi net band ho jaata hai.
Har dusare din ruk jaata hai.

No/Late Complaint Resolution.trigger: Mentions of problems not resolved, no response after complaint, or late fixing.
examples_hi: Complaint ke baad koi jawab nahi.

Bad Customer Support - Call Centre.trigger: Mentions of customer care, or staff not helping / not responding, customer care call not going through.

Bad Customer Support - Technician.trigger: Mentions of technician, or staff not helping / doing bad work / not coming on time / anything related to technician's behaviours, work ethic.

Expensive.trigger: Mentions of mehenga, costly, price high, bahut paisa lagta hai.

28-Day Plan Issue.trigger: Mentions of 28-day plan, monthly expectation, or validity duration.

Shifting not Feasible.trigger: Mentions of having to remove wiom connection due to shifting of connection issues.

OTT Request, No OTT complaint.trigger: Mentions of people complaining about no TV, add-on OTT services or requesting it.

Bad Application.trigger: Mentions of app problems — not opening, recharge option missing, crashing, hanging.

RDNI (Recharge Done, No Internet).trigger: Mentions of having done recharge/payment but internet not working afterwards.
examples_hi: Recharge ke baad net nahi chala.
Payment ho gaya par net nahi.

Range Issue.trigger: Mentions of weak range, limited range.
examples_hi: Doosre kamre tak range nahi aati.
Router ke paas hi chalta hai bas

Internet Down.trigger: Mentions of server down, server problem, or long service outage.

N/A.trigger: Only for irrelevant or non-Wiom comments (greetings, short fillers, self-reference, blanks).

Affordable.trigger: Mentions of sasta, budget, cheap, or appreciation of low price.

General Good Service.trigger: Generic positive comments about service — acchi service, badiya service, best service, not specifying speed or range. Response just says service and is a promoter. Generic positive comments with accha, badiya, best, mast, good, etc. Mentions of brand colour and aesthetics.

Good Speed.trigger: Explicit positive mentions of speed achhi, fast, high speed, or best speed.

Quick Installation.trigger: Mentions of quick or easy installation.

Good customer Support - call centre.trigger: Positive mentions of customer care or call center support.

Good Partner/ Techinician Support.trigger: Positive mentions of partner or technician support.

Fast Complaint Resolution.trigger: Mentions of quick complaint resolution or fast problem fixing.
